scores.1: Mildly lethargic / 輕微嗜睡或活動力下降
scores.2: Moderately lethargic / 明顯嗜睡、不願互動
scores.3: Severely lethargic or collapsed / 極度虛弱、崩潰

scores.0: Stable (or desired weight loss) / 穩定 (或達到預期減重目標)
scores.1: Mild unwanted weight loss or gain / 輕微非預期體重改變
scores.2: Moderate unwanted weight loss / 中度非預期體重流失
scores.3: Severe weight loss (cachexia) / 嚴重消瘦、惡病質
Severe polydipsia (> 100 ml/kg/day) / 嚴重多渴

scores.0: Normal / 正常尿塊大小與頻率
scores.3: Severe polyuria / 嚴重多尿、漏尿或巨大尿塊

interpretation.0-3: Excellent to Good Control (控制極佳至良好)
interpretation.4-7: Fair Control - Needs Re-evaluation (控制普通 - 需重新評估劑量或飲食)
interpretation.8-12: Poor Control / Unstable - High Risk of Complications (控制不良 / 不穩定狀態 - 高併發症風險)
